title: Blood Connect – Emergency Blood Donor-Receiver Platform Frontend

requirements.summary: Build user registration form with role selection (Donor/Receiver), blood group, phone, city, age, and optional last donation date
acceptanceCriteria: User can choose Donor or Receiver role during registration
All required fields (name, blood group, phone, city, age) are validated before submission
Last donation date field is optional and skippable
Registered user profiles are persisted in the Motoko backend
Duplicate phone numbers are rejected with an error message

file_operations.description: Create a registration form component with role toggle (Donor/Receiver), blood group dropdown (A+, A-, B+, B-, O+, O-, AB+, AB-), text inputs for name/phone/city, number input for age, and optional date picker for last donation date. Map frontend blood group values to backend BloodGroup enum. Call backend registerUser() with validated inputs. Show error feedback for duplicate phone or validation failures.
Create registration page that renders RegistrationForm component. After successful registration, redirect user to home or dashboard.
Add route for /register that renders RegisterPage. Ensure registration is accessible from the app navigation or home screen.

requirements.summary: Build Smart Donor Search screen with blood group and city filters, displaying matching donors with 'Available Now' badge for recent activity
acceptanceCriteria: Search form accepts blood group selection and city text input
Results list shows only donors matching the selected blood group and city
Results are sorted by most recently active first
Donors active within 24 hours display a green 'Available Now' badge
Each result card shows donor name, blood group, city, and phone number

file_operations.description: Create search form with blood group dropdown and city text input. On submit, call backend smartDonorSearch(requiredBloodGroup, city) and pass results to parent component.

Create donor result card component displaying name, blood group, city, phone number. Calculate if donor's lastActive timestamp is within 24 hours of current time and show green 'Available Now' badge if true. Include WhatsApp contact button (see REQ-5).
Create donor search page that renders DonorSearchForm and displays list of DonorResultCard components with search results. Results are already sorted by backend.
Add route for /search that renders DonorSearchPage. Wire route into navigation menu.

requirements.summary: Add prominent red SOS Emergency Request button on home screen that creates urgent blood request and shows confirmation
acceptanceCriteria: Home screen displays a large, visually distinct red SOS button
Pressing the button prompts confirmation before submitting
On confirmation, an emergency request record is created in the backend with blood group, city, and timestamp
A success message confirms the request was sent
Emergency requests are queryable separately from normal requests in the backend

file_operations.description: Create large red SOS button component using the generated SOS button image from frontend/public/assets/generated/sos-button.dim_256x256.png. On click, show confirmation dialog. On confirm, fetch current user profile to get blood group and city, then call backend createEmergencyRequest(requester, bloodGroup, city). Display success message after submission.

Create home page that displays the Blood Connect logo from frontend/public/assets/generated/blood-connect-logo.dim_256x256.png in the header, renders the SOSButton component prominently in the center, and includes quick navigation links to search donors, check eligibility, and view dashboard.
Add route for / (home) that renders HomePage. Set as default landing page.

requirements.summary: Build AI Eligibility Checker as a step-by-step questionnaire with rule-based logic to determine donation eligibility
acceptanceCriteria: Questionnaire is presented one step at a time with progress indication
Age under 18 or over 65 results in 'Not Eligible'
Weight under 50 kg results in 'Not Eligible'
Any disqualifying health condition (fever, recent surgery, pregnancy, active medication) results in 'Not Eligible' with the specific reason shown
If last donation was less than 3 months ago, user is shown the next eligible donation date
Eligible users see a green 'Eligible to Donate' result with the next donation date

file_operations.description: Create rule-based eligibility checker function that takes age, weight, lastDonationDate, and health conditions array as inputs. Return eligibility status (eligible/not eligible), reason if not eligible, and next donation date if applicable. Rules: age 18-65, weight >= 50kg, no disqualifying conditions, last donation >= 3 months ago.

Create multi-step questionnaire component with progress indicator. Steps: 1) age input, 2) weight input, 3) last donation date picker, 4) health conditions checkboxes (fever, recent surgery, pregnancy, medication, none). After all steps completed, call eligibilityChecker utility and display result screen with eligibility status, reason, and next donation date.
Create eligibility checker page that renders EligibilityQuestionnaire component with instructions at the top.
Add route for /eligibility that renders EligibilityPage. Wire route into navigation.

requirements.summary: Add WhatsApp contact button on donor result cards with pre-filled message using wa.me deep link
acceptanceCriteria: Each donor card in search results has a WhatsApp button
Tapping the button opens WhatsApp with the donor's number and a pre-filled message
The link uses the wa.me format with the donor's stored phone number
Button is visually styled in WhatsApp green

file_operations.description: Add WhatsApp button to the donor card using wa.me deep link format: https://wa.me/<phone_number>?text=Hi,%20I%20found%20your%20profile%20on%20Blood%20Connect.%20I%20urgently%20need%20blood.%20Can%20you%20help? Style button in WhatsApp green (#25D366) with WhatsApp icon.

requirements.summary: Build Dashboard screen showing total donors, nearby donors, and recent emergency requests
acceptanceCriteria: Dashboard displays total donor count as a prominent stat
Nearby donors section lists donors matching the logged-in user's city
Recent requests section shows the 5 latest emergency requests with blood group, city, and relative time
All data is fetched from backend queries
Dashboard refreshes data on each visit

file_operations.description: Create React Query hook that calls backend getDashboardData() to fetch totalDonors count, nearbyDonors array, and recentRequests array. Use queryKey ['dashboardData'] and enable refetch on mount.
Create dashboard stats component that displays total donor count as a large prominent number with label.
Create nearby donors list component that renders donor cards (reuse DonorResultCard) for donors in the user's city.
Create recent requests list component that displays the 5 most recent emergency requests with blood group, city, and relative time (e.g., '2 hours ago') calculated from timestamp.
Create dashboard page that uses useGetDashboardData hook and renders DashboardStats, NearbyDonorsList, and RecentRequestsList components. Show loading state while fetching.
Add route for /dashboard that renders DashboardPage. Wire route into navigation.

requirements.summary: Build Admin Panel at /admin with user list, remove user action, and emergency requests list
acceptanceCriteria: Admin panel is accessible at /admin route
All users are listed with name, role, blood group, city, and phone
Each user row has a 'Remove' button that deactivates the user in the backend
Removed users are hidden from donor search results
All emergency requests are listed with requester info and timestamp
Admin panel has no authentication gate in this initial version (access by URL)

file_operations.description: Create React Query hook that calls backend getAdminPanelData() to fetch users array and emergencyRequests array. Use queryKey ['adminPanelData'].
Create React Query mutation hook that calls backend deactivateUser(userPrincipal). Invalidate ['adminPanelData'] query on success.

Create admin user table component that displays paginated list of all users with columns: name, role, blood group, city, phone, and Remove button. Use useDeactivateUser hook for remove action. Show confirmation dialog before deactivation.
Create admin emergency requests table component that displays all emergency requests with columns: requester name, blood group, city, timestamp (formatted as readable date/time).

Create admin panel page that uses useGetAdminPanelData hook and renders AdminUserTable and AdminEmergencyRequestsTable components. Include page title and instructions. No authentication guard in this version.
Add route for /admin that renders AdminPanelPage. Include link to admin panel in navigation (visible to all users in this version).

requirements.summary: Apply clean medical design theme with white backgrounds, red accent, large fonts, large touch targets, and mobile-first layout
acceptanceCriteria: Primary accent color is red (#DC2626) used on buttons, badges, and highlights
All background surfaces are white or light gray
Body text is at minimum 16px; headings are at minimum 20px
All interactive buttons have a minimum height of 48px
Layout is centered and constrained to mobile width (max ~430px)
SOS button is visually dominant on the home screen
No blue or purple in the color palette

file_operations.description: Update global styles to set base font size to 16px, apply white background, and define custom CSS variables for red accent (#DC2626), light gray surfaces, and ensure mobile-first responsive layout. Set body max-width constraint for mobile (430px centered).

Extend Tailwind theme to include custom red primary color (#DC2626), update default font sizes (base 16px, headings 20px+), set button min-height utilities (min-h-12 = 48px), and configure max-width constraint for mobile layout.

Create a layout wrapper component that centers content, applies max-width constraint (~430px), includes the Blood Connect logo from frontend/public/assets/generated/blood-connect-logo.dim_256x256.png in the header, and provides consistent white background and spacing.
Wrap all routes with Layout component to apply consistent medical theme styling across the app.

requirements.summary: Use generated Blood Connect logo image in app header and navigation
acceptanceCriteria: Logo image is displayed in the app header
Logo is loaded from frontend/public/assets/generated/
Logo is appropriately sized for a mobile header (height ~40px)

file_operations.description: Add Blood Connect logo image to the header using src path /assets/generated/blood-connect-logo.dim_256x256.png with height set to 40px. Ensure logo is centered or left-aligned in the header bar.
